_readme: Edit this file to change ANY bot text, questions, answers, or menu structure. No code changes needed. Each label/answer can have en/hi/hinglish; if a language is missing the bot falls back to 'fallbackLanguage'. A node with 'children' is a menu; a node with 'answer' is a final reply; a node with 'ref' reuses another node's children.

welcome.en:
🙏 *Welcome to MAAsterG Communication Team* 🙏
🙏 *मास्टरG कम्युनिकेशन टीम में आपका स्वागत है* 🙏

I can guide you to MAAsterG's Vaanis, spiritual guidance, events and more.

💡 Type *menu* anytime, *back* to go back, or *help* if you get stuck.

askLanguage.en:
🙏 *MAAsterG Communication Team*

Please choose your preferred language:

1️⃣ English
2️⃣ हिंदी (Hindi)
3️⃣ Hinglish

_Reply with a number, or type the language name._
askLanguage.hi:
🙏 *मास्टरG कम्युनिकेशन टीम*

कृपया अपनी पसंदीदा भाषा चुनें:

1️⃣ English
2️⃣ हिंदी
3️⃣ Hinglish
askLanguage.hinglish:
🙏 *MAAsterG Communication Team*

Apni pasand ki language chune:

1️⃣ English
2️⃣ Hindi
3️⃣ Hinglish

languageInvalid.en: 🙏 Please reply *1*, *2* or *3* — or type *English*, *Hindi*, or *Hinglish*.

askName.en:
😊 Before we begin, what may I call you?

_Please type your *name*._
askName.hi:
😊 शुरू करने से पहले, मैं आपको किस नाम से बुलाऊं?

_कृपया अपना *नाम* लिखें।_
askName.hinglish:
😊 Shuru karne se pehle, main aapko kis naam se bulaun?

_Kripya apna *naam* likhein._

askCity.en: 🏙️ Thank you, {name}! Which *city* are you from? _(optional — reply *skip* to continue)_
askCity.hi: 🏙️ धन्यवाद, {name}! आप किस *शहर* से हैं? _(वैकल्पिक — जारी रखने के लिए *skip* लिखें)_
askCity.hinglish: 🏙️ Dhanyavaad, {name}! Aap kis *city* se ho? _(optional — continue karne ke liye *skip* likhein)_

mainMenuTitle.en:
🙏 *What are you seeking right now, {name}?*

Choose an option:
mainMenuTitle.hi:
🙏 *आप इस समय क्या खोज रहे हैं, {name}?*

एक विकल्प चुनें:
mainMenuTitle.hinglish:
🙏 *Aap is samay kya dhoondh rahe ho, {name}?*

Ek option chune:

invalid.en: ❌ Sorry, I didn't understand that. Please reply with one of the numbers below (you can also type a keyword).
invalid.hi: ❌ क्षमा करें, मैं समझ नहीं पाया। कृपया नीचे दिए नंबरों में से एक चुनें (आप कीवर्ड भी टाइप कर सकते हैं)।
invalid.hinglish: ❌ Maaf kijiye, main samajh nahi paya. Kripya neeche diye numbers me se ek chune (keyword bhi type kar sakte ho).

notAnswered.en: 🙏 We don't have a ready answer for this yet. Please email us at *{contactEmail}* and MAAsterG's team will personally get back to you.
notAnswered.hi: 🙏 इसका उत्तर अभी तैयार नहीं है। कृपया हमें *{contactEmail}* पर ईमेल करें, मास्टरG की टीम आपसे संपर्क करेगी।
notAnswered.hinglish: 🙏 Iska answer abhi ready nahi hai. Kripya humein *{contactEmail}* par email karein, MAAsterG ki team aapse contact karegi.

backOptions.en:
⬅️ Reply *back* for the PREVIOUS menu
🏠 Reply *menu* for the MAIN menu
backOptions.hi:
⬅️ पिछले मेनू के लिए *back* लिखें
🏠 मुख्य मेनू के लिए *menu* लिखें
backOptions.hinglish:
⬅️ Pichle menu ke liye *back* likhein
🏠 Main menu ke liye *menu* likhein

help.en:
ℹ️ *How to use this bot*

• Reply with a *number* to choose an option
• You can also type *keywords* (e.g. Vaani, stress, events)
• Type *back* — previous menu
• Type *menu* — main menu
• Type *language* — change language

🙏 Type *menu* to begin.

answer.en:
💛 *Relationships & Breakups*

Pain in relationships comes from expectation and attachment. MAAsterG's Vaanis help you find peace within — so no person's presence or absence can disturb you.

▶️ Start listening: {youtubeHindi}

For personal guidance, email {contactEmail}.

📚 *Exam & Academic Stress*

Stress clouds the mind. Listening to Vaanis daily calms the mind and sharpens focus, so you can give your best without fear of results.

▶️ {youtubeHindi}

Need to talk? Email {contactEmail}.

💼 *Work Stress*

MAAsterG teaches how to work fully yet stay light inside — action without anxiety. Regular Vaani listening dissolves the pressure at its root.

▶️ {youtubeHindi}

For personal help, email {contactEmail}.

💞 *Marriage Problems*

Most conflict dissolves when we work on ourselves first. MAAsterG's Vaanis build acceptance and inner peace that transform relationships from within.

▶️ {youtubeHindi}

For personal guidance, email {contactEmail}.

🤍 *Loneliness*

You are never truly alone. MAAsterG's Vaanis help you discover a fullness within that no external company can give.

▶️ {youtubeHindi}

We're here — email {contactEmail}.

🕊️ *Fear*

Fear loses its grip in the light of understanding. Listen to MAAsterG's Vaanis daily to grow fearless from the inside.

▶️ {youtubeHindi}

Email {contactEmail} for support.

🪙 *Financial Stress*

MAAsterG teaches right effort with inner calm. Vaanis remove the anxiety that clouds decisions and drains your energy.

▶️ {youtubeHindi}

Email {contactEmail}.

🌅 *Depression*

Please be gentle with yourself. Lakhs of people have found lightness and hope through MAAsterG's Vaanis. Begin with a few minutes daily.

▶️ {youtubeHindi}

🙏 If you need to talk to someone, email {contactEmail}. If you are in crisis, please also reach a local helpline or doctor.

🧠 *Overthinking*

The mind quietens when it is fed the right understanding. Daily Vaani listening slows the endless thoughts and brings stillness.

▶️ {youtubeHindi}

Email {contactEmail}.

🌿 *Anxiety*

Anxiety fades as trust in life grows. MAAsterG's Vaanis rebuild that trust, breath by breath, day by day.

▶️ {youtubeHindi}

Email {contactEmail} for personal support.

label.en: 📿 Know more about MAAsterG & His Work
label.hi: 📿 मास्टरG और उनके कार्य के बारे में जानें
label.hinglish: 📿 MAAsterG aur unke kaam ke baare me jaane

label.en: What is the proof that what MAAsterG says is the truth?

answer.en:
📗 *Courses*

For details on any courses, satsangs or events, please email {contactEmail} or visit {website}.

label.en: What is 'Art of Dying' in MAAsterG's logo?
Where can I listen to more Vaanis?
How long to listen to see impact?
Prescribed manner and time to listen?
Is there any age limit for Vaanis?
Are Vaanis connected to any specific religion?
How many people listen to Vaanis regularly?
What change do regular listeners see?
After how many Vaanis can I see transformation?
Will Vaanis help me get enlightened?
Will Vaani help me become positive?
Will Vaani help fulfil my desires / make me happy?
Will Vaani heal my chronic illness?
Will Vaani help heal my relationships?
What if I am unhappy even after listening?

answer.en:
🙏 *If You Still Feel Unhappy*

Please keep listening daily with patience and an open heart — transformation deepens over time. If you'd like personal guidance, email {contactEmail}.

📜 *About GHJF*

God Home Journey Foundation carries forward MAAsterG's mission. For full details, please visit {website} or email {contactEmail}.

label.en: How does GHJF fund its activities?

answer.en:
🪙 *Funding*

MAAsterG shares his wisdom completely free and without donations. For specifics on how the Foundation runs, please email {contactEmail}.

label.en: I want to contribute to GHJF

answer.en:
🤝 *Contribute / Seva*

Thank you for your generous heart! Please email {contactEmail} with how you'd like to contribute, and the team will guide you.

label.en: Does GHJF have an ashram or office?

answer.en:
📍 *Ashram / Office*

For current location and visiting details, please email {contactEmail} or visit {website}.

label.en: How can I become a member of GHJF?

answer.en:
🙏 *Membership*

The best way to begin is to listen to the Vaanis daily. To connect with the community formally, email {contactEmail}.

label.en: Where can I buy MAAsterG's books?

answer.en:
📖 *MAAsterG Books*

MAAsterG's books are available online. For current links and titles, please visit {website} or email {contactEmail}.

label.en: I am a media person and want to connect

answer.en:
🎤 *Media Enquiry*

Wonderful! Please email {contactEmail} with your outlet and request, and the team will connect with you.

label.en: I want to host MAAsterG on my podcast

answer.en:
🎙️ *Podcast Invitation*

Thank you! Please email {contactEmail} with your podcast details and proposed dates.

label.en: I want to organise an event at my institution

answer.en:
🎤 *Organise an Event*

We'd love to bring MAAsterG to your community! Please email {contactEmail} with your institution, city, expected audience and preferred dates.

label.en: What happens at a MAAsterG event?
I want to attend a satsang in my city

answer.en:
🤝 *Attend a Satsang*

Wonderful! Please email {contactEmail} with your name and city, and the team will inform you of satsangs near you.

label.en: I want to organise a satsang

answer.en:
🙏 *Organise a Satsang*

Thank you for your seva spirit! Email {contactEmail} with your city and details to get started.

label.en: How can I meet other Vaani listeners?

answer.en:
👥 *Meet Other Listeners*

Join a local satsang or the community. Email {contactEmail} with your city to connect with fellow listeners.

label.en: I speak neither Hindi nor English

answer.en:
🌐 *Other Languages*

We're working to reach more languages. Please email {contactEmail} and tell us your language — it helps us grow.

label.en: Can I get Vaanis in my local language?

answer.en:
🗣️ *Vaanis in Local Languages*

More languages are being added over time. Email {contactEmail} with your language request.

label.en: My question is not covered in any option

answer.en:
🙏 *Your Question*

No problem! Please email {contactEmail} and MAAsterG's team will personally get back to you.

label.en: I want to speak to someone in MAAsterG's team

answer.en:
📞 *Speak to the Team*

Please email {contactEmail} with your name, city and how we can help. A team member will reach out.
